channel.title: Posts on Camilla Guo
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Camilla Guo

item.title: Summer 2019 Trip
item.description: In my Comp Bio class, we learned R and Python. The following is an example of the two ssspeaking. library(reticulate) location = "Europe" location = "Belgium, the Netherlands, and France" print(f"In summer 2019, I traveled to {r.location}. I've included photos from {location} that were only part of the trip.") ## In summer 2019, I traveled to Europe. I've included photos from Belgium, the Netherlands, and France that were only part of the trip.
